arts.sum: Mason Greenwood to Saudi Arabia at 23? 🤯

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona transfer news: Jonathan Tah confirms Leverkusen exit, Barca set to move
arts.sum: Barcelona ’s first signing of the summer has drawn nearer with the news that Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah has announced his intention to depart the Bundesliga side. CONFIRMED: Jonathan Tah transfer decision as Barcelona rumours build

arts.ttl: Toni Fernandez dazzles as Barca Atletic secure crucial win
arts.sum: Barcelona teenager Toni Fernandez put in another eye-catching performance as Barca Atletic beat Real Union 3-1 on Sunday in a crucial win as they bid to avoid relegation. An early sending off did help Barca Atletic’s cause, with Fernandez going on to bag the opener after a great one-two with Cedric.

arts.ttl: How Hansi Flick dealt with angry outbursts from three Barcelona players after Celta Vigo win
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick was delighted after his side managed a dramatic comeback from two goals down in the second half against Celta Vigo, with Raphinha’s penalty in stoppage time securing a 4-3 win. arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Raphinha feels about shock Barcelona exit as Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea all plot £80m move
arts.sum: Raphinha has already decided his future 🚨

arts.ttl: Barcelona launch Rashford bid as star rejects chance to double his wage in the Premier League
arts.sum: While the Rashford case is developing, Barcelona are poised to retain one of their most promising young players, with Fermin Lopez ready to turn down a big-money offer from the Premier League. Villa have a purchase option in the loan deal worth €47 million (£40m), but Champions League football is likely to be necessary to make Rashford a viable purchase due to his big wages.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool contact ‘defensive striker’ but he prefers a move to Barcelona
arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Liverpool are looking to sign a striker in the summer transfer window. The Premier League giants are ready to strengthen their attack this summer in order to improve the over all standards of their squad. arts.ttl: Barcelona could offer £34m for versatile Man United player who dreams of joining them
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Marcus Rashford is currently on loan at Aston Villa, and he is expected to leave the club permanently at the end of the season. The 27-year-old England international has fallen down the pecking order at Old Trafford, and it will be interesting to see if Manchester United are prepared to cash in […] The post Barcelona could offer £34m for versatile Man United player who dreams of joining them appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘He’ll surely stay with us next season’ - Deco on Szczesny
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco has all but confirmed Wojciech Szczęsny is set to stay at the club for another season. Szczęsny signed a one-year deal after coming out of retirement to sign for the Catalans but has gone on to become first choice while Marc-Andre ter Stegen is out injured.
